Allen Graves and Seth Lundy will sit out the Raptors Summer League finale. CMB, Martin, Hepburn still down too.

Standard move to get a bit longer a look at guys like Bradley and possible 905 options.

items.title: Raps up 11 late against Houston in LVSL. A quieter night for Allen Graves, who has 9 points, 3 rebounds and 5 fouls, but he's in the middle of everything. Hesitant to do more than shoot or pass in half court, although that will be the bulk of his role this year. Nice night for Ch
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: Raps up 11 late against Houston in LVSL. A quieter night for Allen Graves, who has 9 points, 3 rebounds and 5 fouls, but he's in the middle of everything. Hesitant to do more than shoot or pass in half court, although that will be the bulk of his role this year. Nice night for Chucky Hepburn.

items.title: Noticed Boston trying to play the drop-and-rotate scheme against the PnP. Not executed well, but Toronto countered with pop-and-burn action w/ Graves (i.e. using a 45 cut to punish the stunt/help). Added detail: Lifted the corner player into the vacated space behind the cut. Nift
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt: Noticed Boston trying to play the drop-and-rotate scheme against the PnP. Not executed well, but Toronto countered with pop-and-burn action w/ Graves (i.e. using a 45 cut to punish the stunt/help). Added detail: Lifted the corner player into the vacated space behind the cut. Nifty.

items.title: Just doing some anxious math as the time passes, if Raps trade for Kawhi and gave him the max 2-year extension, they would owe about $166.7 million to Kawhi, Barnes, IQ and Poeltl in 2027-28. would go up to $183.8 with CMB, WALTER and Graves. That's with no RJ/Shead.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: Just doing some anxious math as the time passes, if Raps trade for Kawhi and gave him the max 2-year extension, they would owe about $166.7 million to Kawhi, Barnes, IQ and Poeltl in 2027-28. would go up to $183.8 with CMB, WALTER and Graves. That's with no RJ/Shead.

items.title: Assuming the Raptors allow Battle's deal to guarantee on Wednesday, Raps will enter offseason with about $189.86 million committed to 12 players: Barnes, BI, IQ, RJ, Poeltl, Dick, CMB, WALTER, Graves, Shead, TJD (partial guarantee) + Battle. Tax expected around $200 million.
